entries.title: Notes inbox page.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews notes assigned to them, mentions, and reminders from the inbox.

entries.title: User-menu notes item with attention badge.
entries.notes: Requires seeded assigned, mentioned, or overdue note attention counts.
entries.useCase: An administrator sees the user-menu notes item with an attention badge.

entries.title: Empty notes inbox state.
entries.notes: Shows the default inbox state for a user with no notes requiring attention.
entries.useCase: An administrator sees the default empty inbox state when no notes need attention.

entries.title: Notes inbox with assigned, mentioned, and overdue reminder counts.
entries.notes: Requires seeded notes covering assignment, mention, and reminder states.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews seeded assigned, mentioned, and overdue reminder counts.
